Class EcKeyPair

java.lang.Object
com.seq.acheron.secrets.asymmetric.AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair
com.seq.acheron.secrets.asymmetric.EcKeyPair
public class EcKeyPair extends AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair
Elliptic Curve implementation of AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair.

This class uses standard named curves (e.g. "secp256r1") and the JCA "EC" algorithm. It can be used for ECDSA, ECDH, etc., depending on how you use the keys.

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT_CURVE

      public static final String DEFAULT_CURVE
      Standard curve name used by default, e.g. NIST P-256.

      Also known as "prime256v1". [web:147][web:154]

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • EcKeyPair

      public EcKeyPair(PublicKey publicKey, PrivateKey privateKey)
      Creates a new EcKeyPair from existing key objects.
      Parameters:
      publicKey - EC public key
      privateKey - EC private key

  • Method Details

    • generate

      public static EcKeyPair generate(String curveName) throws GeneralSecurityException
      Generates a new EC key pair using the given named curve.

      For example, "secp256r1" is a widely used NIST P-256 curve. [web:147][web:154]

      Parameters:
      curveName - the standard curve name (e.g. "secp256r1")
      Returns:
      a new EcKeyPair instance
      Throws:
      GeneralSecurityException - if the algorithm or curve is not supported

    • generateDefault

      public static EcKeyPair generateDefault() throws GeneralSecurityException
      Generates a new EC key pair using DEFAULT_CURVE.
      Returns:
      a new EcKeyPair instance
      Throws:
      GeneralSecurityException - if the algorithm or curve is not supported

    • fromBase64

      public static EcKeyPair fromBase64(String base64PublicKey, String base64PrivateKey) throws NoSuchAlgorithmException, InvalidKeySpecException
      Reconstructs an EcKeyPair from Base64-encoded public and private keys.

      Expects:

      • Public key in X.509 / SubjectPublicKeyInfo format
      • Private key in PKCS#8 format
      Parameters:
      base64PublicKey - Base64-encoded EC public key
      base64PrivateKey - Base64-encoded EC private key
      Returns:
      the reconstructed EcKeyPair
      Throws:
      NoSuchAlgorithmException - if EC is not supported
      InvalidKeySpecException - if key data is malformed

    • getAlgorithm

      public String getAlgorithm()
      Description copied from class: AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair
      Returns the algorithm name (e.g. "RSA", "EC") for this key pair.
      Specified by:
      getAlgorithm in class AbstractAsymmetricKeyPair
      Returns:
      the algorithm identifier
